Author: DukePantarei
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes (Maintained)
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Description:
Removes the letterboxing bars displayed during cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.

Note: You may occasionally see NPCs popping in or T-posing at screen edges. This is expected.
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
